title: 10 medicinal preparations of Picrasma excelsa  (sumatra)

preparations_list.preparation_desc: Picrasma excelsa, also known as Sumatra, capsules is used to promote overall well-being and alleviate various health issues. The capsule's active compound, Quassia amara, has been traditionally employed in traditional medicine to treat digestive problems, such as diarrhea, constipation, and gastritis. It may also help reduce inflammation, improve respiratory function, and exhibit antimicrobial properties, making it a natural remedy for colds, coughs, and skin infections. Additionally, Sumatra capsules are believed to have antioxidant properties, which can contribute to overall health and wellness.

Picrasma excelsa, also known as Sumatra tea, is used to promote overall health and wellness. The tea has been traditionally used in Asian medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, cough, and digestive issues. It is also rich in antioxidants and flavonoids, which can help protect against cell damage and reduce inflammation. Additionally, the tea may help lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and support immune function.

Picrasma excelsa, also known as Sumatra, tinctures is used to treat a variety of health issues. It has anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties that help reduce joint pain and swelling, making it effective in managing conditions like arthritis. Additionally, the tincture has antimicrobial and antiviral properties, which can aid in treating infections and promoting wound healing. Its anti-parasitic properties also make it useful in eliminating intestinal worms and other parasites from the body.

Picrasma excelsa, also known as Sumatra, decoctions is used to treat various health ailments. The decoction has been traditionally used in folk medicine to manage fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. It is also effective in reducing inflammation and pain, making it a popular remedy for arthritis and other musculoskeletal disorders. Additionally, the decoction has antioxidant properties that help boost the immune system and protect against infections.

Picrasma excelsa, also known as Sumatra, salves is used to alleviate various health concerns. The salve is rich in antioxidants and has anti-inflammatory properties, making it effective in treating skin conditions such as eczema, acne, and psoriasis. It can also be used to soothe minor wounds, burns, and insect bites. Additionally, the salve has been traditionally used to reduce joint pain and inflammation, making it a popular remedy for arthritis and other musculoskeletal issues.

Picrasma excelsa ointments is used to treat various health issues. It has anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties that help soothe skin irritations, wounds, and cuts. The ointment is also effective in reducing swelling and pain associated with sprains, strains, and bruises. Additionally, it can be used to treat fungal infections such as athlete's foot and ringworm due to its antifungal properties. Overall, Picrasma excelsa ointments are a natural and gentle solution for promoting wound healing and overall skin health.

Picrasma excelsa, also known as Sumatra cream, is used to alleviate various health issues. The cream has anti-inflammatory properties that help soothe skin irritations and wounds, reducing redness and swelling. Additionally, it exhibits antiseptic and antibacterial qualities, making it an effective treatment for acne, eczema, and other skin infections. Its antioxidant properties also promote wound healing and skin regeneration, contributing to overall skin health and wellness.

Picrasma excelsa, also known as Sumatra, gels is used to alleviate various health issues. The gel has anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties that help reduce pain and swelling in joints and muscles. It is also used to treat skin conditions such as eczema, acne, and rosacea by reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. Additionally, the gel can be used topically to soothe burns, cuts, and scrapes, making it a versatile remedy for various health purposes.

Picrasma excelsa, also known as Sumatra, tablets is used to alleviate symptoms associated with various health conditions. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The tablet's anti-inflammatory properties can also help reduce pain and swelling, making it a popular remedy for arthritis and other musculoskeletal disorders. Additionally, Picrasma excelsa tablets are said to have antioxidant properties that may help boost the immune system and protect against free radicals.

Picrasma excelsa, also known as Sumatra, lozenges is used to alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis, coughs, and colds. Its expectorant properties help loosen mucus and reduce congestion, making it easier to breathe. The lozenges can also be used to soothe a sore throat and provide quick relief from discomfort. Additionally, the anti-inflammatory properties of Picrasma excelsa may help alleviate symptoms of asthma and other respiratory conditions, making it a natural remedy for overall respiratory health.

intro: Picrasma excelsa has several medicinal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and capsules. These preparations are useful for treating a variety of ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions like eczema and psoriasis. The plant's bark is often made into a tea that can be used to reduce inflammation and improve digestion. Additionally, the extract is sometimes used topically to treat wounds and injuries due to its antimicrobial properties.
intro_desc: Picrasma excelsa has several medicinal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions. These preparations are useful for treating various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The extracts from the plant are also used to reduce inflammation and ease pain.
